visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, dark hair wearing a black top with sheer, puffed sleeves stands in a warehouse-style supermarket. She faces the camera, holding two clear plastic containers of prepared vegetable sets. Behind her are rows of stacked cardboard boxes filled with produce on industrial shelving. (2) Close-up shot of a vegetable platter container. It contains segmented corn on the cob, sliced white lotus root, whole shiitake mushrooms, and pieces of ginger. A label with Chinese text and 'VEGETABLE PLATTER' is clearly visible on the packaging. (3) The camera shifts to another similar container being held, this one labeled as a 'Spices Set' containing garlic bulbs, long green onions, and red chili peppers. The woman's hands are seen adjusting the containers. (4) The woman reaches back to the shelf to pick up a third container. This set, for 'Chicken Soup', features corn, chestnuts, large mushrooms, and corn shoots. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a large retail store. (5) The camera pans across orange industrial shelving to show white price tags. One tag shows '150899' and a price of '$249', while another nearby shows '$199'. (6) Return to a medium shot of the woman holding both sets. She continues speaking to the camera with an expressive face, occasionally gesturing with the products. A person in a white jacket and green apron is briefly visible working in the background distance.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 煮婦大幫手. [Subtitle]: 好市多最近出很多這種組合. (2) [Variety]: 讓你料理用. (3) [Subtitle]: 首先是排骨湯. [Slogan]: 排骨湯配料組. (4) [Variety]: 辛香料組. [Subtitle]: 辛香料組. (5) [Subtitle]: 辛香料還有雞湯. (6) [Subtitle]: 雞湯來了雞湯來了. (7) [Subtitle]: 嘿. [Slogan]: 雞湯配料組. (8) [Variety]: 很用心耶. [Subtitle]: 很用心耶. (9) [Variety]: 還有玉米筍哈哈哈. [Subtitle]: 還有玉米筍哈哈哈. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後雞湯是249. [Slogan]: 雞湯 249. (11) [Subtitle]: 排骨湯249 辛香料199. [Slogan]: 排骨湯 249 辛香料 199. (12) [Subtitle]: 你覺得值得嗎? (13) [Subtitle]: 但你要人家幫你切好選好一定比較貴嘛. [Variety]: 切好選好比較貴嘛. (14) [Subtitle]: 但好處是你不用買那麼多. (15) [Subtitle]: 所以如果你常常買菜. (16) [Subtitle]: 還是你去餐廳. (17) [Subtitle]: 你這樣講就不好玩了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator in foreground, 1 person in white uniform in distant background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long black wavy hair, wearing a black fashionable top with sheer sleeves and a heart-shaped necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with high-stack industrial shelving, orange beams, and numerous cardboard boxes labeled in Chinese and English.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in a cheerful Mandarin tone, describing products. Accompanied by a bouncy, major-key electronic BGM with a steady 124 BPM beat. A bright 'pop' sound effect occurs as visual text overlays appear. (2) The voice maintains a moderate speech rate with high clarity. A subtle 'ding' sound effect punctuates the mention of a specific spice set. The BGM remains consistent in the background. (3) The speaker's pitch rises as she laughs briefly, followed by continued descriptive narration. The sound of plastic containers shifting slightly creates a faint rustling noise floor. (4) The dialogue concludes with a conversational question to the audience. The BGM continues its playful synthesized rhythm until the end of the clip, maintaining a high energy level.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce and review newly available pre-cut vegetable and spice sets at Costco. The creator highlights the convenience for home cooks while weighing the higher cost against the time saved and portion control benefits, ending with a call for audience feedback on the value proposition.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While featuring products from Costco, it appears to be a neutral consumer review or vlog rather than a paid sponsorship.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Social-media style short video with high text density and upbeat audio, effectively targeting busy home cooks.
